svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net"> <diagram name="Страница-1" id="iJZO8Hjqj_NMYsTkt5BF"> <mxGraphModel dx="962" dy="658" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="827" pageHeight="1169" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <UserObject label="" plantUmlData="{
 "data": "@startuml
skinparam linetype ortho

entity \"catalog.product_categories\" {
 * id : SERIAL <<PK>>
 --
 * name : VARCHAR
}

entity \"catalog.products\" {
 * id : SERIAL <<PK>>
 --
 * sku : VARCHAR(30)
 * name : VARCHAR
 * price : NUMERIC(10,2)
 * category_id : INTEGER <<FK>>
}

entity \"catalog.warehouses\" {
 * id : SERIAL <<PK>>
 --
 * city : VARCHAR
 * address : VARCHAR
 label : VARCHAR
 * is_central : BOOLEAN
}

entity \"sales.orders\" {
 * id : SERIAL <<PK>>
 --
 * status : VARCHAR
 * total_amount : NUMERIC(10,2)
 * created_at : TIMESTAMPTZ
 * warehouse_id : INTEGER <<FK>>
}

entity \"sales.order_items\" {
 * id : SERIAL <<PK>>
 --
 * order_id : INTEGER <<FK>>
 * product_id : INTEGER <<FK>>
 * price : NUMERIC(10,2)
 * quantity : INTEGER
}

\"catalog.product_categories\" ||--o{ \"catalog.products\" : \"category_id\"
\"catalog.warehouses\" ||--o{ \"sales.orders\" : \"warehouse_id\"
\"sales.orders\" ||--o{ \"sales.order_items\" : \"order_id\"
\"catalog.products\" ||--o{ \"sales.order_items\" : \"product_id\"

@enduml
",
 "format": "svg"
}" id="eoiS3gsCWbpoXoKZ2QwD-1"> <mxCell parent="1" style="shape=image;noLabel=1;verticalAlign=top;aspect=fixed;imageAspect=0;image=data:image/svg+xml,;" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="551" width="682" x="20" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </UserObject> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
